title: Phase 1C: Auth, permission, and feature flag services
description: Build the auth service (session management, token handling, login/logout), permission evaluation service (check user permissions with scope awareness), and feature flag evaluation service (evaluate flags by company/branch/role/user).
steps: Create src/lib/auth/options.ts with NextAuth configuration (JWT strategy, credentials provider, session callbacks)
Create src/lib/auth/helpers.ts with session helpers (getCurrentUser, requireAuth, requireRole)
Create src/lib/permissions/evaluate.ts with permission evaluation engine
Implement scope-aware permission checks (company-wide, branch-scoped, own-records-only)
Create src/lib/feature-flags/evaluate.ts with feature flag evaluation
Implement flag resolution hierarchy: user > role > branch > company > default
Add caching layer for permission and flag lookups via Redis
